posts.text:
NEW at @DropSiteNews: Behind the Bombs, New Details Emerge on Iran’s Infiltration of Israel

As arrests grow in Israel, internal Iranian intelligence materials shed light on Tehran’s clandestine attempts to turn Israeli citizens into spies.
dropsitenews.com/p/iran-mini…

The U.S. & Israel routinely conduct strikes knowing they will kill large numbers of civilians. They justify it by claiming they were being used as human shields or are collateral damage. So spare us the nonsense about Iranian officials "knowing" the US won't kill them in public.

As Hegseth and Gen. Caine give a briefing at the Pentagon claiming Iran’s leaders are hiding like “rats,” footage is broadcast of Iranian President Pezeshkian marching openly in the streets of Tehran today:

nitter.net/IrnaEnglish/status/203…


IRNA News Agency ☫ (@IrnaEnglish)

The footage shows the moment a missile hit a building near the location of Judiciary Chief Gholam-Hossein Mohseni-Ejei  during the Quds Day rally in Tehran.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/IrnaEnglish/status/2032410039311311232#m

nitter.net/jeremyscahill/status/2…


jeremy scahill (@jeremyscahill)

Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi was also in the streets for Quds Day march as Israel continued to bomb the country.



— https://nitter.net/jeremyscahill/status/2032411777904837077#m

nitter.net/jeremyscahill/status/2…


jeremy scahill (@jeremyscahill)

Ali Larijani, Secretary of the Supreme National Security Council of Iran, marched in the streets of Tehran today despite explicit threats to assassinate him. Other senior Iranian officials also participated in mass public rallies for Quds Day as bombs continued to hit Iran.



— https://nitter.net/jeremyscahill/status/2032402811124633894#m

War Secretary Pete Hegseth just claimed that Iranian leaders have gone underground and are hiding, saying "that's what rats do." Meanwhile, several senior Iranian officials have been openly marching through the streets of Tehran today even as US-Israeli bombing continues.

Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi was also in the streets for Quds Day march as Israel continued to bomb the country.


خبرگزاری فارس (@FarsNews_Agency)

📷 حضور عراقچی در راهپیمایی روز قدس تهران





— https://nitter.net/FarsNews_Agency/status/2032411492889301160#m

Ali Larijani, Secretary of the Supreme National Security Council of Iran, marched in the streets of Tehran today despite explicit threats to assassinate him. Other senior Iranian officials also participated in mass public rallies for Quds Day as bombs continued to hit Iran.


Arya Yadeghaar (@AryJeay)

NEW: Iran’s top security official, Ali Larijani, was seen outside marching among the people in Tehran for Quds day, in broad daylight, no fear.

I can’t lie, you’ve got to have guts to do this whe

Triple Strike Hits Apartment Buildings in Tehran Killing 40

Mahmoud Aslan reports from the scene of the bombing for @DropSiteNews 

dropsitenews.com/p/tehran-st…
Trump just said that the U.S. is holding back on  bombing some non-specified sites in Iran, saying if they hit these sites, "They literally would never be able to build that country back."

A majority of likely American voters believe that Donald Trump launched the war on Iran at least in part to distract from the Jeffrey Epstein scandal that had engulfed his presidency, according to a new poll.

dropsitenews.com/p/new-surve…

🚨We had heard this at the time via witnesses and asked CENTCOM about it and they did not respond to our requests for comment.
nitter.net/jeremyscahill/status/2…




Jennifer Jacobs (@JenniferJJacobs)

NEWS via @CBSNews: An Iranian drone attack in Kuwait that killed U.S. service members in the early hours of the war with Iran was more severe than previously known, with dozens suffering injuries that included brain trauma, shrapnel trauma and burns, per sources. More than 30 remained in hospitals

OK. Now explain the restrictions placed on CNN by the Israeli government.


CNN (@CNN)

Erin Burnett takes shelter in Tel Aviv amid missile sirens while speaking with Fred Pleitgen in Tehran. CNN operates in Iran with the permission of the Iranian government, as required under local regulations, but maintains full editorial control over what it reports.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/CNN/status/2031682970403156456#m

In asymmetric warfare, the less powerful side does not need to militarily defeat an adversary, but rather force it to a point where it determines the costs of continuing the war is too high.

dropsitenews.com/p/iran-war-…

'Lies After Lies'

⚡The Devil in the Details of Trump’s "Final Proposal" for Gaza Ceasefire

A Hamas official accused Trump of aiding an Israeli “deception operation,” but the movement says it wants to bridge the gaps and make a deal.

We obtained the proposal. Details below:
www.dropsitenews.com/p/trump-neta...

"Letter from Gaza: The Nakba We Are Living Through"

Powerful story from Hamza Salha on how he and his family were forced to flee their home in the Jabaliya refugee camp in northern Gaza to head for an unknown fate as Israel expands its attacks.
www.dropsitenews.com/p/nakba-gaza...

⚡️Hamas Responds to Witkoff Gaza Proposal, Demands Trump Guarantee Israel Won’t Resume Genocide 

Drop Site obtained the new proposal, which Hamas drafted in consultation with a range of Palestinian factions. Full text of document and story below 🔽
www.dropsitenews.com/p/hamas-resp...

⚡️How Israel and Witkoff Are Trying to Strong-Arm Hamas Into a Deal That Does Not End the Genocide

A point-by-point breakdown of how the U.S. and Israel changed the deal Hamas said it made with Trump's envoys. 
www.dropsitenews.com/p/israel-ham...

⚡️Israel Expands Ethnic Cleansing Operations in Khan Younis 

As Israel intensifies its war of "conquest" and annihilation, Donya Abu Sitta reports from Khan Younis on the recent wave of Israeli attacks and forced displacement against Palestinians.
www.dropsitenews.com/p/israel-eth...

🚨Netanyahu: Gaza Aid Scheme Offers Israel Symbolic Cover to Finish the Genocide
www.dropsitenews.com/p/netanyahu-...

🚨 Hamas Says Steve Witkoff Personally Promised Gaza Blockade Would Be Lifted in Exchange for Edan Alexander 

The U.S. broke the deal, a senior Hamas official told me. “They threw it in the trash” and there has been “zero” progress on a Gaza ceasefire.
www.dropsitenews.com/p/witkoff-ha...

🚨Hamas says it had an understanding with the U.S. that after Hamas released Edan Alexander, humanitarian aid would begin entering the Gaza Strip immediately and a U.S. call would be made for a ceasefire and comprehensive negotiations. New reporting below:
www.dropsitenews.com/p/trump-neta...

🎥 WATCH | Drop Site co-founder @jeremyscahill.com spoke to Breaking Points this morning  about Trump bypassing Israel to speak directly with Hamas. In the clip below, he explains the context in which the agreement to release U.S.-Israeli soldier Edan Alexander was reached.

@krystalball.bsky.social

"The Unbearable Pain of Leaving Gaza"

Our remarkable colleague Abubaker Abed never wanted to leave his homeland. In a deeply personal essay, he describes the excruciating decisions he was forced to make.

www.dropsitenews.com/p/abubaker-a...

In an exclusive interview, Mohammed Al-Hindi of Palestinian Islamic Jihad said Israel is deluding itself into believing it can defeat the Palestinian cause. 

Al-Hindi and other PIJ leaders almost never speak to Western journalists. Full story @dropsitenews.com 🔽
www.dropsitenews.com/p/islamic-ji...

The attack on Ben Gurion Airport, the downing of U.S. drones, and attacks on naval vessels show that Ansar Allah (the Houthis) has remained resilient despite months of bombing.

www.dropsitenews.com/p/houthis-an...

You can also listen to my full interview with senior Hamas official Osama Hamdan and read the transcript of our conversation here:
www.dropsitenews.com/p/osama-hamd...

🚨 How Hamas Sees the Current Moment: I sat down with senior Hamas official Osama Hamdan for a wide-ranging interview 🔽
www.dropsitenews.com/p/osama-hamd...

Here is the full video discussion I had with Mohammad Alsaafin about the ongoing Gaza genocide, the "ceasefire" talks, why disarmament is a "red line" and about the legacies of Hamas leader Yahya Sinwar and Al Qassam Brigades commander Mohammed Deif.
www.youtube.com/live/wGSbAOX...

Status of the Gaza ceasefire talks: Israel, via Arab mediators, is pushing for a short term deal with only loose language about it leading to a potential end of the war. Hamas is offering a proposal for a comprehensive, multi-year truce & detailed responses to Israel's positions.

⚡️New Gaza Ceasefire Proposal Contains “Red Lines” for Hamas on Continued Israeli Occupation and Disarmament.

We obtained a draft of a deal currently being pushed by the U.S., Egypt, and Qatar. Hamas insists it will not capitulate to Netanyahu’s new demands.

www.dropsitenews.com/p/new-gaza-c...

🚨A sweeping crackdown on posts on Instagram and Facebook that are critical of Israel—or even vaguely supportive of Palestinians—was directly orchestrated by the government of Israel, according to internal Meta data obtained by @dropsitenews.com 
www.dropsitenews.com/p/leaked-dat...

⚡Top Houthi Official Tells Drop Site Yemen Will Cease Attacks on U.S. Ships if Trump Halts Bombing

New report from Shuaib Almosawa and me
www.dropsitenews.com/p/houthi-uni...

NEW: British lawyers representing Hamas just filed a legal case challenging its UK designation as a terror group. They charge the UK is aiding the Gaza genocide, undermining the right to armed resistance & stifling debate in the UK about Hamas’s aims and actions.
www.dropsitenews.com/p/hamas-terr...
15,000 targets struck in Iran, Hegseth says; Lebanon is near a “breaking point”; U.S. temporarily lifts Russian oil sanctions (by Drop Site News)

Behind the Bombs, New Details Emerge on Iran’s Infiltration of Israel. As arrests grow in Israel, internal Iranian intelligence materials reviewed by Drop Site shed light on Tehran’s clandestine attempts to turn Israeli citizens into spies.
UN says 3.2 million displaced in Iran; 40+ senators press Hegseth over Iran school bombing; Drone strikes in Sudan kill dozens of civilians (by Drop Site News)

Rescue Efforts in Tehran After a Triple Strike Hit Apartment Buildings, Killing 40 (by mahmoud aslan). “Every time we lifted a stone, we increased our sense that we might succeed in saving a life, or that we might find someone who could not be saved.”

NEW POLL: Majority of Americans Believe Trump Launched Iran War to Cover Up Epstein Scandal (by Ryan Grim). A new Drop Site/Zeteo/Data For Progress survey also finds likely American voters are split on whether Trump is more responsive to the American people or to Israel.
Over 1,000 children injured in Iran; Unprecedented 400M barrels of oil reserves slated for release; Death and displacement mount in Lebanon amid Israeli assault (by Drop Site News)

In Tehran, Iranians Struggle to Breathe After Israeli Oil Facility Strikes (by Ariya Farahmand). "By the time we finally packed our bags and locked the door, our fingernails were caked in chemical grime, and our lungs were burning just from breathing inside our own living room."
Trump Might Want to End the War. Iran Won’t Do It on His Terms.. Iran says the U.S. and Israel underestimated its military capacity and will to fight, as Trump careens toward a quagmire.
40 killed in strike on Tehran; Trump says Iran war “very complete, pretty much” while Hegseth promises “most intense day of strikes”; Quadcopters in Haiti (by Drop Site News)

Ground Troops, Airstrikes, and Displacement: No Guarantee of Safety in Lebanon With Relentless Israeli Assaults (by Lylla Younes). As Lebanon’s strained shelter system struggles to cope, Israel is focused on “collective punishment” and pitting the Lebanese government against Hezbollah.

Iran Weighs Tactical Shift in Persian Gulf Strikes While Intensifying Attacks on Israel. A senior Iranian official told Drop Site that Iran has achieved most of its tactical aims against U.S. military infrastructure, but warned it will still respond to attacks launched from Arab states.
Oil prices yoyo as refineries hit and shipments halt; White House won’t rule out a draft in Iran war; Trump bails out Ticketmaster (by Drop Site News)

Iran Denies Asking Trump to Talk; Official Says No Negotiations Will Be Considered Until a New Supreme Leader Is Named. A senior Iranian official told Drop Site that despite U.S. claims that Iran’s military capacity is decimated, Tehran is expanding its retaliatory strikes with more powerful weapons.
U.S.-Israeli bombardment of Iran enters 7th day; Hundreds of thousands displaced in Lebanon amid Israeli assault; Trump fires Noem (by Drop Site News)

Dozens Killed and Thousands Displaced in Growing Pakistan-Afghan Border Conflict (by Emran Feroz). Amid the U.S.-Israel war on Iran, Pakistan's recent assertiveness against the Taliban also serves as a message to the West.
